title: alysicarpus schomburgkii
intro: Alysicarpus schomburgkii, also known as the Indian horsefly or horsefly bean, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alysicarpus schomburgkii include its potential to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Alysicarpus schomburgkii are typically made by drying and powdering the plant's leaves and stems, and can be consumed as a tea or capsule.
